title: paraphlomis gracilis
intro: Paraphlomis gracilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Chinese snake grass or Chinese snake root. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Paraphlomis gracilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Paraphlomis gracilis is often combined with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is typically consumed in the form of a decoction or infusion.
